title: Protest organised over US military use of Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A demonstration is taking place at Glasgow Prestwick Airport, organised by local campaigners from Ayrshire. The protest is focused on the American military's use of the airport, which has raised concerns among some community members about military activities in the area.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The protest reflects wider apprehensions regarding military operations and their implications for local communities. Supporters of the demonstration argue that the presence of US military forces at Prestwick Airport contributes to increased militarisation and potentially conflicts with community values.
